role: Healing, adapting, and mastering the meditation state
treePosition: As presented in the workbook, following Heru Khuti — see Sekher's provenance note on how this ordering was inferred.
teachingNotes: Power of healing, learning, growing, adapting and changing our behavior patterns.
Mastery of the meditation state to transcend Stress responses like Fear, Anger, and Panic.
Cultivation of Caring, which lays the foundation for relationships, parenting and psychic healing.

hekau.text: I am a divine spiritual being cultivating my oneness with God. I grow, I change, I soar above all difficulties. I am one with them.
Plasticity of my brain is a scientific fact. Thank you, God, for your wisdom. I am as young as I strive to be.
My eyes are on my divinity and my oneness with you God, for wealth, health, and success.
What kind of God would place our wellbeing beyond our control in the psyche? Thank you, God for Auset.
I take neither gain nor loss to heart. I am too busy meditating on the Peace that is my nature.
I am ready to sacrifice the animal and human within. There are no limits to my devotion to you God.
Thank you God for the opportunity to learn that pain and suffering are the wages of not transcending being human.
